name: Ginger root & Honey Decoction (Remedy #1)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve cold & sore throat by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Fennel seeds & Coriander seeds Infusion (Remedy #2)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve acidity & heartburn by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Plain yogurt & Water Elixir (Remedy #3)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve bloating & gas by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

name: Milk & Grated nutmeg Bedtime Brew (Remedy #4)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve insomnia & anxiety by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Peppermint oil & Coriander seeds Steam Inhalation (Remedy #5)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve headache & stress by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Turmeric powder & Ginger powder Warm Poultice (Remedy #6)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve joint pain & stiffness by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Peppermint oil & Coriander seeds Steam Inhalation (Remedy #248)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve headache & stress by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Turmeric powder & Ginger powder Warm Poultice (Remedy #249)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve joint pain & stiffness by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

name: Lemon juice & Ginger juice Digestive Drink (Remedy #250)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve indigestion & slow agni by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Aloe vera gel & Sandalwood powder Cooling Paste (Remedy #251)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve skin rash & itching by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Coconut oil & Curry leaves Hair Nourishing Oil (Remedy #252)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve hair fall & thinning by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Aloe vera gel & Sandalwood powder Cooling Paste (Remedy #494)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve skin rash & itching by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Coconut oil & Curry leaves Hair Nourishing Oil (Remedy #495)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve hair fall & thinning by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

name: Rose water & Cucumber juice Eye Compress (Remedy #496)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve eye strain & burn by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Ashwagandha powder & Warm milk Rejuvenating Tonic (Remedy #497)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve fatigue & low energy by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Haritaki powder & Warm water Mild Laxative Drink (Remedy #498)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve constipation by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Giloy powder & Tulsi leaves Immunity Kadha (Remedy #801)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve mild fever by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

name: Ajwain seeds & Rock salt Spiced Water Carminative (Remedy #802)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve muscle spasms by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Castor oil & Ginger powder Joint Massage Blend (Remedy #803)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve back pain by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Clove oil & Cotton ball Soothing Compress (Remedy #804)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve nausea & motion sickness by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Mint leaves & Fennel seeds Oral Rinse (Remedy #805)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve bad breath by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Turmeric powder & Ginger powder Warm Poultice (Remedy #924)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve joint pain & stiffness by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Lemon juice & Ginger juice Digestive Drink (Remedy #925)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve indigestion & slow agni by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Aloe vera gel & Sandalwood powder Cooling Paste (Remedy #926)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve skin rash & itching by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Coconut oil & Curry leaves Hair Nourishing Oil (Remedy #927)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve hair fall & thinning by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Pomegranate juice & Pinch of nutmeg Astringent Juice (Remedy #985)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve diarrhea & loose motion by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Mulethi (Licorice) powder & Honey Soothing Tea (Remedy #986)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve dry cough by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Neem paste & Turmeric powder Purifying Mask (Remedy #987)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve pimples & acne by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

name: Lemon juice & Coconut oil Anti-dandruff Wash (Remedy #988)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve dandruff & dry scalp by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Honey & Sandalwood paste Ulcer Application (Remedy #989)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve mouth ulcers by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.

warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Mulethi (Licorice) powder & Honey Soothing Tea (Remedy #1229)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve dry cough by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Neem paste & Turmeric powder Purifying Mask (Remedy #1230)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve pimples & acne by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Lemon juice & Coconut oil Anti-dandruff Wash (Remedy #1231)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve dandruff & dry scalp by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Honey & Sandalwood paste Ulcer Application (Remedy #1232)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve mouth ulcers by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Giloy powder & Tulsi leaves Immunity Kadha (Remedy #1233)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve mild fever by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Clove oil & Cotton ball Soothing Compress (Remedy #1290)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve nausea & motion sickness by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Mint leaves & Fennel seeds Oral Rinse (Remedy #1291)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve bad breath by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Eucalyptus oil & Mustard oil Soothing Rub (Remedy #1292)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve sore muscles by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Ginger juice & Lemon juice Appetizer Shot (Remedy #1293)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve low appetite by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve toothache by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.

Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.

usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Ginger root & Honey Decoction (Remedy #1351)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve cold & sore throat by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Fennel seeds & Coriander seeds Infusion (Remedy #1352)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve acidity & heartburn by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Plain yogurt & Water Elixir (Remedy #1353)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve bloating & gas by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

name: Milk & Grated nutmeg Bedtime Brew (Remedy #1354)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve insomnia & anxiety by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Peppermint oil & Coriander seeds Steam Inhalation (Remedy #1355)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve headache & stress by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Aloe vera gel & Sandalwood powder Cooling Paste (Remedy #1412)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve skin rash & itching by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Coconut oil & Curry leaves Hair Nourishing Oil (Remedy #1413)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve hair fall & thinning by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

name: Rose water & Cucumber juice Eye Compress (Remedy #1414)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve eye strain & burn by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Ashwagandha powder & Warm milk Rejuvenating Tonic (Remedy #1415)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve fatigue & low energy by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Haritaki powder & Warm water Mild Laxative Drink (Remedy #1416)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve constipation by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Fennel seeds & Coriander seeds Infusion (Remedy #1595)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve acidity & heartburn by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Plain yogurt & Water Elixir (Remedy #1596)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve bloating & gas by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Milk & Grated nutmeg Bedtime Brew (Remedy #1597)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve insomnia & anxiety by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Peppermint oil & Coriander seeds Steam Inhalation (Remedy #1598)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve headache & stress by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Turmeric powder & Ginger powder Warm Poultice (Remedy #1599)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve joint pain & stiffness by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Coconut oil & Curry leaves Hair Nourishing Oil (Remedy #1656)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve hair fall & thinning by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Rose water & Cucumber juice Eye Compress (Remedy #1657)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve eye strain & burn by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Ashwagandha powder & Warm milk Rejuvenating Tonic (Remedy #1658)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve fatigue & low energy by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Haritaki powder & Warm water Mild Laxative Drink (Remedy #1659)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve constipation by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.

preparation: Warm the base liquid in a small saucepan on medium heat.
Add the grated spices and simmer for 5 minutes.
Consume warm 30 minutes before sleep.
usage: Drink warm 30-45 minutes before going to bed.
warning: Do not exceed the specified dosage of heating herbs.

name: Honey & Sandalwood paste Ulcer Application (Remedy #1961)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve mouth ulcers by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil water and pour into a wide heatproof bowl.
Add the herbal oils or fresh leaves.
Inhale the rising steam with a towel draped over your head for 5-8 minutes.
usage: Inhale the steam once or twice daily during active congestion.
warning: Keep eyes closed during steam inhalation to avoid irritation.

name: Giloy powder & Tulsi leaves Immunity Kadha (Remedy #1962)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve mild fever by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Heat the carrier oil in a small pan on low flame.
Add the herbs and sliced garlic, letting it simmer until brown.
Cool down, strain, and massage onto the affected region.
usage: Apply and massage gently onto the affected area twice daily.
warning: Perform a patch test on skin before full application.

name: Ajwain seeds & Rock salt Spiced Water Carminative (Remedy #1963)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve muscle spasms by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Boil the primary herb and ingredients in water for 10 minutes.
Reduce to half the initial volume.
Strain and cool down to a warm drinkable state.
Stir in honey or sweetening agent and sip slowly.
usage: Consume 2-3 times daily on an empty stomach.
warning: Do not boil honey directly or add to boiling hot liquid.

name: Castor oil & Ginger powder Joint Massage Blend (Remedy #1964)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve back pain by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Crush the dry seeds gently to release natural oils.
Pour boiling hot water directly over the seeds in a cup.
Cover with a lid and let it steep for 12 minutes.
Filter and consume at room temperature.
usage: Sip slowly throughout the day or after meals.
warning: Ensure the infusion is not too hot when consumed.

name: Clove oil & Cotton ball Soothing Compress (Remedy #1965)
desc: A traditional Ayurvedic home remedy designed to relieve nausea & motion sickness by balancing localized doshic imbalances and strengthening natural healing functions.
preparation: Whisk the yogurt and water together until completely smooth and frothy.
Remove the top layer of foam to keep it light on the stomach.
Mix in the toasted spices and salt.
usage: Drink with or immediately after lunch.
warning: Avoid using sour or expired dairy products.
